zh.lifeSummary: 當Godfrey de Valletort於1035年出生在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥延瓦托特時，他的父親Roger de Valletort64歲，母親Beatrice FitzRichard35歲。他和Mrs. Godfrey de Valletort至少有3個兒子。他去世於1086年在英國英格蘭薩默塞特瑟 斯度維享年51歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特瑟 斯度維。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Godfrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Old French name Godefroy, which is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from god ‘god’ (or gōd ‘good’) + fred, frid ‘peace’. This was adopted by the Normans, and brought to England by immigrants from the Low Countries and France. It was borne by a Norman saint ( c.1066–1115 ) who became bishop of Amiens. There has been considerable confusion with Geoffrey .

en.lifeSummary: When Godfrey de Valletort was born in 1035, in Vautorte, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France, his father, Roger de Valletort, was 64 and his mother, Beatrice FitzRichard, was 35. He had at least 3 sons with Mrs. Godfrey de Valletort. He died in 1086, in Nether Stowey, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 51, and was buried in Nether Stowey, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Godfrey de Valletort est né en 1035, à Vautorte, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France, son père, Roger de Valletort, avait 64 ans et sa mère, Beatrice FitzRichard, avait 35 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils avec Mrs. Godfrey de Valletort. Il est décédé en 1086, à Nether Stowey, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à Nether Stowey, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Godfrey de Valletort 1035 in Vautorte, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger de Valletort 64 und seine Mutter Beatrice FitzRichard 35. Er hatte mit Mrs. Godfrey de Valletort mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1086 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Nether Stowey, Somerset, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Nether Stowey, Somerset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Godfrey de Valletort è nato il nel 1035 nel Vautorte, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Francia, il suo padre, Roger de Valletort, aveva 64 anni e il suo madre, Beatrice FitzRichard, aveva 35 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli con Mrs. Godfrey de Valletort. ja.lifeSummary: Godfrey de Valletortが1035年にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメイエンヴァウトルトで生まれた時，父Roger de Valletortは64歳，母Beatrice FitzRichardは35歳であった。彼はMrs. Godfrey de Valletortとの間に少なくとも3人の息子をもうけた。彼は1086年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトネスエル ストウエイで51歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスソメルセトネスエル ストウエイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Godfrey de Valletort(이)가 1035년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 메이니 바토르트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger de Valletort(은)는 64세였고, 그의 어머니 Beatrice FitzRichard(은)는 35세였다. 그는 Mrs. Godfrey de Valletort(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1086년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 네터 스타우이에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 네터 스타우이에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Godfrey de Valletort родился в 1035 г. в местности вауторт, меиенн, пеис де ла лоир, Франция, его отцу по имени Roger de Valletort было 64 года, а матери, которую звали Beatrice FitzRichard, 35. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына от Mrs. Godfrey de Valletort. Он умер в 1086 г. в местности нетир стоуи, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности нетир стоуи, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.
